positive: A minimalist, stylized celestial map depicting a group of friendly, fantastical cosmic creatures (e.g., gentle star spirits, floating nebula whales, crescent moon owls) gently orbiting a central glowing 'Heart of Creation' constellation. The overall style should be a mix of intricate linework, ethereal watercolor washes, and cosmic bioluminescence, highly detailed but clean. Use deep sapphire blues, shimmering gold leaf accents, soft lavender, and contrasting bright milky white for the light sources. The composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for an all-over apparel print, featuring strong negative space and clean, recognizable silhouettes of the creatures. Lighting should be soft, internal glow, emphasizing contrast between the dark cosmic void and the brilliant celestial forms. Vector art aesthetic meets detailed cosmic tapestry. Rule of thirds composition variation to keep the central subject prominent.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, celebrity likenesses, copyrighted characters, bad anatomy, messy, grunge, noise, low detail, excessive depth, photorealism, grayscale, sketch, photo, 3d render
